name: /promote-standard creates a new rule entry with class equal to published-standard provenance
command: mkdir -p standards/snapshots active-rules && printf 'sections:\n  5.2.4: x\n' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-standard.sh" owasp-asvs 5.2.4 --snapshot standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml --rules-out active-rules 2>err.txt && grep -q 'class: published-standard' active-rules/owasp-asvs-5-2-4.yaml && grep -q 'source_id: owasp-asvs' active-rules/owasp-asvs-5-2-4.yaml && echo ok 1>&2
